utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 top-level items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: Present and includes both physical and mental health insurance with stated monthly costs and a total health cost. Fully specified per requirement. 2) property_coverage: Present and specifies home/contents insurance with costs and a total property cost. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: Present and specifies travel insurance with costs and a total travel cost. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: Present with a membership enhancement and its monthly cost, plus effect on total. Fully specified. 5) total_budget: Present with complete monthly totals (core and enhanced) and annual savings plus a recommendation. It provides a breakdown, satisfying the item. All 5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four specific items that match names in the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Physical Health (maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan), LifeFirst Standard Mental Health (maps to primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (maps to property_protection.home_content.PrimeHome Premium Coverage), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.PrimeTravel Premium Plan), and Premium Insurance Membership (maps to general_services.Premium Insurance Membership). I extracted each corresponding rating number from the ground-truth.
